rationale: The confirmed US-Iran ceasefire and oil price drop remains the dominant story for Romania's energy costs and economy — no new qualitative change this cycle.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; Strait of Hormuz reopening, markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices and rising markets from the confirmed US-Iran deal benefit Romania through lower energy costs. No new qualitative change this cycle — continuation.

top_events.title: Protesters clash with police ahead of G7 summit in Geneva
top_events.summary: Anti-G7 protests in Geneva are a distant event with negligible direct impact on Romanian daily life.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A UK-Japan bilateral investment deal has no direct impact on Romania; minor background signal for EU trade environment.
